params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep, if CARDNAME has two or fewer judgment counters on it, put a judgment counter on it.

params.Description: As long as CARDNAME has three or more judgment counters on it, it can attack as though it didn't have defender.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a judgment counter on CARDNAME. Then if there are three or more judgment counters on it, enchanted player loses the game.

params.Description: If CARDNAME would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.
